nasb.text: Rebekah was listening while Isaac spoke to his son Esau. So when Esau went to the field to hunt for game to bring home,

esv.text: Now Rebekah was listening when Isaac spoke to his son Esau. So when Esau went to the field to hunt for game and bring it,

cnv.text: 以撒對他兒子以掃說話的時候，利百加也聽見。以掃到田野去打獵，要帶些野味回來。

ccb.text: 利百加听见了以撒跟儿子以扫说的话。以扫出去打猎后，

csbs.text: 以撒对他儿子以扫说话时，莉白加也在听。在以扫去田野猎取野味的时候，
